§6Molecular Assembler§f:
The §6Molecular Assembler §f(appliedenergistics2:molecular_assembler) is a §ecrafting block §f that §bexecutes §6crafting patterns §f in the §6ME network§f. It is the §6physical endpoint §f of an autocrafting job — without at least one Molecular Assembler, patterns cannot be processed.

§6Production Path (network/crafting/molecular_assembler.json)§f:
Pattern "aba / cde / aba":
- §ba§f: §6Iron Ingot §f(ingotIron) — 4 (corners)
- §bb§f: §6Quartz Glass §f(appliedenergistics2:quartz_glass) — 1 (top middle)
- §cc§f: §6Annihilation Core §f(appliedenergistics2:material:44) — 1 (middle left)
- §cd§f: §6Crafting Table §f(workbench ore_dict) — 1 (centre)
- §ce§f: §6Formation Core §f(appliedenergistics2:material:43) — 1 (middle right)
- Yields 1× Molecular Assembler

§6Function (BlockMolecularAssembler.java)§f:
- §bPattern execution §f: when a §6Pattern §f is requested via the §6Pattern Terminal §f, the Molecular Assembler §bperforms the crafting steps §f in order
- §bInternal buffer §f: 9 slots hold §6intermediate ingredients §f during a multi-step craft
- §bPower draw §f: §b1 AE/t §f at idle, scales with §6crafting complexity §f and §6acceleration upgrades §f
- §bCrafting acceleration §f: §6Acceleration Cards §f speed up the Molecular Assembler (1 card = +50% speed)
- §bParallel crafting §f: place multiple Molecular Assemblers on a single §6Crafting CPU §f for §6parallel job execution §f
- §bNo terminal function §f: a bare Molecular Assembler does §cnot §f open a §6Crafting Terminal §f — place a §6Pattern Terminal §f on it

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 5 items the Molecular Assembler is a component of, including:
- §6Crafting CPU §f(appliedenergistics2:crafting_unit) — required to assign a Molecular Assembler to a CPU
- §6Acceleration Card §f(appliedenergistics2:material:32) — speed upgrade
- §6Co-Processor §f — parallel job upgrade
- §6Pattern Terminal §f(appliedenergistics2:part:340) — terminal that drives the assembler

§6Multiblock Structure§f:
- §ba§f Frame: §b3×3×3 §f hollow cube with the Molecular Assembler at the centre
- §bCPU co-processor §f: add §6Crafting Unit §f variants to expand pattern slots and acceleration

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: pair a Molecular Assembler with a §6Pattern Terminal §f and at least §b1 §f Crafting Storage unit to start autocrafting
- §eTip§f: when a craft is §6blocked §f, the Molecular Assembler emits a §bredstone signal §f from its base — use this to trigger fallback logic
- §cWarning§f: a Molecular Assembler §cdoes not §f extract items from the network; it §bplaces items §f into the world after crafting
- §cWarning§f: a Molecular Assembler with §cno §f Crafting Storage units will §cfail §f on any craft that requires intermediate ingredients
